innateAbility.name: Encore
innateAbility.description: Buffs applied to self and allied units, sourced to Largo, have an extended duration.Self-applied debuffs have an extended duration as well.

abilities.name: Catchy Lick
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted unit a short distance, and applies a basic dispel.Buff or debuffs dispelled from the targeted unit grants self health regeneration bonus.

abilities.name: Frogstomp
abilities.description: Tosses froglings to the area-targeted location.The froglings deals damage and stuns all enemy units within the radius in a certain interval.

abilities.name: Croak of Genius
abilities.description: Grants the buff-affected allied hero mana cost reduction on all abilities.When the buff-affected allied hero casts an ability with mana cost, the remaining buff duration is reduced.

abilities.name: Amphibian Rhapsody
abilities.description: Switches the ability bar switches to three song abilities, each with different ability effects.Largo can cast one Amphibian Rhapsody-based abilities at any given time.

abilities.name: Bullbelly Blitz
abilities.description: When strummed, grants outgoing spell amplification bonus and magical attack damage bonus to all affected allied heroes within the radius.

abilities.name: Hotfeet Hustle
abilities.description: When strummed, grants movement speed bonus and slow resistance bonus to all affected allied units within the radius.

abilities.name: Island Elixir
abilities.description: When strummed, Largo heals allied heroes within the radius.

talents.right: x1.3 Amphibian Rhapsody Ability Effects Factor

talents.left: +100 Catchy Lick Cast Range+50 Catchy Lick Pull Distance
talents.right: +1% Croak of Genius Max Health as Damage per Second
